## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context. Explain the "what" and "why".

Closes: #(issue number)

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🔨 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔄 Refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test additions
- [ ] 🏗️ Chore/Infrastructure

## 🧪 Testing

Describe how you tested your changes. Include steps to reproduce if applicable.

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`npm run test:e2e`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`npm run check`)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Manual testing performed

### Test Coverage

What scenarios did you test?

- [ ] Happy path
- [ ] Error cases
- [ ] Edge cases
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness (if applicable)
- [ ] Offline mode (if applicable)

## 📸 Screenshots/Videos

If this includes UI changes, add screenshots or videos:

<!-- Add screenshots here -->

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines
- [ ] I've run `npm run format` to format my code
- [ ] I've run `npm run lint --fix` to fix linting issues
- [ ] I've updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I've added tests for new functionality
- [ ] I've verified no breaking changes
- [ ] I've checked if any dependencies need updating
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Branch is up to date with main

## 🔍 Review Checklist for Reviewers

- [ ] Code changes are clear and intentional
- [ ] Tests adequately cover changes
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] Performance impact considered
- [ ] Accessibility considered (if UI changes)

## 📌 Related Issues

- Closes #(issue)
- Related to #(issue)

## 🚀 Deployment Notes

Any special deployment considerations?

- [ ] No database migrations needed
- [ ] No environment variables to add
- [ ] No breaking API changes
- [ ] Backward compatible

---

**Thank you for your contribution!** 🎉
